reviews.review_description: Can’t even get game to work and can not connect phones dumb
All you do is press the same buttons over and over. "Game" is a generous description for this title. Don't waste your money.

reviews.review_title: OK game but there’s no players
reviews.review_description:
This game has a single player mode but there is no players online. Can’t find a server. I like the idea and how they pull it off (kinda) but I was expecting more of a Star Trek experience rather than a warioware type button pressing bonanza with occasional aliens and needing to fix buttons on mess-ups. 

Single player only works either bc the servers are offline or nobody plays this game anymore.

reviews.review_title: Very broken. Needs to be fixed
reviews.review_description:
This game is a virus.
Every time I TRY to play it, the game just has a mental breakdown and I can barely even leave.
So overall, this game is trash! 😁

reviews.review_title: Would be great if we could play it!
reviews.review_description: We used to play this game a few years back on our phones, and we loved it! This on the other hand doesn't load. Such a shame, and waste of money. 🙁

reviews.review_title: So much potential but so buggy
reviews.review_description:
This game is a blast when you get going but the servers are super unreliable running the experience. Nothing sucks more than getting through half a dozen nail biting levels just to have all the phone players drop out. 

If you click play again at the end of a game the phone players don’t come along. 

If they vr players don’t join before the phone players they end up stacking on top of each other and can’t see the screens anymore. 

The game is just so glitchy and the servers are so bad its really frustrating. 

Can’t recommend at all.

The first problem is that the web stvr.app is not working correctly. We have tried to insert the code in the text box with two smartphones and one tablet (Samsung and Xiaomi) and the device keyboard appear and disappear. The only way to insert the codes was to write in another application and making a copy/paste of it. But when a game finished, never it works to restart it, always we have to create another game, and we had to insert all the codes again and again.

The second problem, we are not an english speakers, but it does not matter because only we have to repeat (more or less) the commands and search them in our controls. But, in the fourth or fifth sector (in easy mode), the commands appear with underlines instead of many letters, and then it was impossible to us to deduce de correct words.

I don't understand that a game which mobile version is translated to another languages it does not use those translations to include in the VR game.

In resume, a good idea bad implemented.

In the vein of Keep Talking, we totally have a blast playing this little marvel. This feel like a board game when the family comes over so expect laughter screams and shouts. Different from other store games. Definitely an awesome addition to my library. Mobile players on their phones are having a good time too as they have similar tasks as the VR player and are as involved.

At first glance it seemed it was not my type of game, I should've picked this on up way sooner. Ignore the current score averages, they are not representative in my opinion.

This game is a lot of crazy fun, like a 6-player round of Bop-it where the tool is actually changing in your hands as you play. I can't wait to see an active multiplayer lobby to fully crew this insane ship!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! Be sure to check out our Thursday night social events we have planned!

reviews.review_description: It’s been 2 days man, I want my refund

developer_response.body:
Hi there. Refunds are processed by Meta themselves, not by us, the developer.

We're sorry to hear that you require a refund and felt you needed to leave a one-star review. If you could offer us a little more feedback, we could possibly use it to help improve things or resolve your situation. You can reach us directly at crew@spaceteamvr.com

reviews.review_description:
This is a good, fun, well built party game. That being said, I want to mention a single technical issue I found while playing. Upon trying to reset my position by holding down the oculus button, the game didn’t know what to do. It chugged and has crashed on occasion, but if it doesn’t crash it takes a solid 20 seconds for the game to fix itself. After this process, it still doesn’t reset your position. 
On another note, I would love some more info for the online part of Spaceteam. I see high potential in online for this game, but upon checking for a lobby almost 15 times with no results, it seems to be a cause soon to be lost. I would suggest asking for users to agree (if they want) to give you rights to record minor information such as when any VR player checks for an online lobby for Spaceteam. With this info, you could show a chart of most common times that players are on. This way, it would be easier to find a match over time. 

Thank you for the game, and I hope you will continue listening to your community as you have before.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and be sure to check out our Thursday night play sessions we're organising in the events section of 'Social' to find more people online. We'll be making further adjustments and improvements and I'm sure you'll have lots of people to play with soon!

reviews.review_description: I have played Spaceteam on the phone before, but this is the game that none of us asked for, but we all needed it! I’ve always wanted a single player mode, and this game delivered!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and the lovely review!

reviews.review_description: All you do is push buttons and lose your voice, no one I played with liked it. Not worth 20 at all. Should be 5 at most. All in all, this is a piece of trash. Didn’t get a refund in time, so bad I completely uninstalled it. THIS IS TRASH!!!

reviews.review_title: The Reviews are Dumb. This Game Rocks
reviews.review_description:
I'll tell you what, this game is really fun and the developers are putting their heart and soul into it. You get two people or three people or four people playing it, yet it's a multiplayer game, and it's co-op, so you won't really feel like throwing the headset across the room when you lose like in PVP.  Well, you might (#$@& flying saucers!!)

I haven't played with a six-man team yet, but I can imagine the chaos that would ensue and how absolutely a blast it would be. There would literally have to be some sort of organizational thing going on. People shouting over each other trying to get the commands out, things catching on fire, switches breaking, someone's voice sounds like they did a bunch of helium and are talking really fast and you have no idea what they're saying, the other dude's head is gigantic and he's talking really slow with a Wooommp kind of tone to his voice. People trying to figure out how to pronounce the words for the commands that you're telling other people.. honestly, it's like a board game, in a way, come to life.

Also, it's a puzzle game. Let's face it, if you like puzzle games and you like challenges, and you like to play with your friends, or you like to play with other people (with puzzle games) (get your mind out of the gutter) then this is pretty much a win-win situation. I think what people need to do when they play this game is friends list everybody that you play with and start getting groups going on on a daily basis.

Stop listening to these little kids that can't wait 5 minutes for someone to show up and play with them and so they leave and then write a bad review.

It's like Anthony Bourdain when he talks about yelp. Look up the YouTube video, he says that yelpers are the worst human beings on Earth because they leave bad reviews for the wrong reasons and ruin restaurants. 

I promise you, get this game, have your friends or family get this game, you can even play it if you have a group of people in the same room, one person jumps on the VR headset and the rest of the people can play it from their phone.

Obviously it's going to be even better if you're one of those Rich families where everybody has a headset LOL.

Oh, and I'll tell you what, if you get this game, send me a friend request, I'll accept it, then send me a chat message and tell me you bought the game, and I'll find time to jump in with ya.

Do it! Do it NOW! (Get to da choppah!!)

developer_response.body: Hey there. Thanks very much for taking the time to leave a review. We're delighted to hear how much you enjoy Spaceteam VR. We've got some exciting things planned for the near future of Spaceteam VR, too! We have some new anomalies being introduced adding even more variety to the gameplay. There's a PSVR version in the works which will have cross-play with the PCVR and Oculus community, increasing player numbers and reducing any potential wait times for a game. We also have another little surprise up our sleeves which will bring even more players into the chaos of Spaceteam VR - we'll have more to reveal on that very soon.

reviews.review_title: Don’t judge a book by its cover
reviews.review_description: When I watched the trailer and thought is was not my type of game but then played it with my friend and was hooked.

I was eager to buy this and following the practice there are never any games. I've had it for 2 months and there have never been any players around to play with. Waste of money, waste of time, and i cant even get a refund for it so its entirely useless.

developer_response.body:
Heya there!
We are sorry you have had a bad experience with matchmaking other players. We are doing our best to support and grow our player base. We hold events on Thursdays that you can join via the Oculus Events system which gathers players between 7pm to 9pm in the BST and PDT times zones to play together. Hope to see you at one of these events!

reviews.review_description: I had an amazing time with the tutorial but then when I wanted to play with actual people there was no one playing, not on the US server, not on the EU server, not on the Australia server. There was one time when there was someone playing but when I tryed to play i would press join and it would give me a black screen for a second then put me back in the home area.

developer_response.body: Hey! Thanks for the review, we're bringing new updates and organising events to bring more people together while we grow the userbase further! Be sure to check out the mobile crossplay also!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on many platforms
reviews.review_description:
Loved the Android game, loved the card game, now I love the Oculus game!
The fact some players can join in at home on their phones is brilliant!!!
Some suggestions...
Full integration with the phone app... Instead of going to a website outside the app.  The phone app needs more console stuff, it's too simplistic.  Those in VR have fires to put out and aliens to fight so the phone app players need more challenge.  This game is not about winning but dying. 
I also feel that the VR game also hasn't got the full feel of the panic and chaos the phone app has.
I suspect it will be refined in time.
Great job to the company who developed this!  I expect I will see more great things soon :-)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and be sure to check out our Thursday night play sessions we're organising in the events section of 'Social'.

We'll be continuing to update the F2F and VR version :)

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely LOVE this game!!! Couple years ago we had about 6 of us playing a mobile version of this game for the holidays and had hours of fun and laughs!  

The game is very creative. A whole lot more to do than the mobile game. I think I made it up to 19 on the practice mode. 

My brother just got his oculus quest today and he already downloaded it. Early bday gift for him! Now there’s at least 3 of us that will be on this game regularly. I’m telling my other friends about space team as well. Keep up the great work! SPACE TEAM 🖖
I love the game but the only issue I have is finding multiplayer games I can’t even find any game of multiplayer and I still haven’t been able to play with another person yet

developer_response.body: Sorry you have had a bad experience with matchmaking other players. We are doing our best to support and grow the player base. We hold events on Thursdays (ThursdayTeamTime) that you can join via the Oculus Events system which gathers players between 7pm to 9pm in the BST and PDT times zones to play together. Hope to see you at one of these events!
